transcript: Green coming to EGM 5 minutes. On board, we have a 58, 5-8-year-old female. Excuse me, 57-year-old female. Incorrected. She complained of EGOS and a slight hematoma with a laceration to the occipital region of her skull. We are not sure exactly how it all happened. She has had some vision ice, EGN-03, EGS-14, skin-sides pink, warm and dry, and ambisorbs with a semi-steady. plus figure 104, 149 over 99 pressure, 98% room air, 87 heart rate, normal sinus rhythm on the monitor. And we will see you in about a minute. Thanks for talking.
